caseInstanceId.description: The unique identifier of the trade case instance to review

shipmentReference.description: The shipment or purchase order reference number

taskId.description: The HiTL task ID assigned to the human reviewer

priority.description: Task priority level (Low, Medium, High, Critical)

decision.description: The human reviewer's decision (Approve or Reject)

reviewedBy.description: Email of the reviewer who completed the action

reviewedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the review was completed

Approved.description: The case was reviewed and approved for processing

Rejected.description: The case was reviewed and rejected

Escalated.description: The case was escalated to a senior reviewer
